task_completion.description: Select the 'SpeakerCone' object in the Blender scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'SpeakerCone' object is highlighted in the 3D Viewport or selected in the Outliner panel.

task_completion.description: Insert a keyframe for the Z-axis Scale property to create an F-Curve.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Object Properties -> Transform panel, the Scale Z field is highlighted in yellow or green, or an F-Curve for 'Z Scale' is visible in the Graph Editor.

task_completion.description: Open the 'Bake Sound to F-Curves' dialog and navigate to the target audio file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender file browser dialog is open for 'Bake Sound to F-Curves', showing the path '/home/ga/assets/beat.wav'.

task_completion.description: Verify the sound wave is baked into the Z-axis Scale F-Curve.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Graph Editor is open and displays a dense, waveform-like series of keyframes specifically on the 'Z Scale' channel for the 'SpeakerCone' object.

task_completion.description: Save the completed project to the specified output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog shows the path '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/visualizer_completed.blend', or the Blender window title bar updates to show this filename.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Blender GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through Blender menus, the Graph Editor, and Properties panels, rather than executing terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a Python script to bypass manual UI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Blender Text Editor or Python Console is not the primary tool used to execute the baking and saving process.

integrity.description: The baked F-Curve appears to be a genuine audio waveform.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Graph Editor shows a very dense set of keyframes with varying amplitudes, not just a few manually placed keyframes mimicking a wave.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target object: 'SpeakerCone'. Target property: Scale Z-axis (array index 2). Audio file to bake: '/home/ga/assets/beat.wav'. Output file: '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/visualizer_completed.blend'. A successful bake will result in a dense F-Curve (strictly more than 50 keyframes) with visible amplitude variance (strictly > 0.1) on the Z-axis Scale channel in the Graph Editor.
